top_signals.title: Amundi Wants Oil, Gas in EU’s New Energy-Transition Fund Class
top_signals.summary: Amundi SA wants the European Union to free asset managers to add oil and gas exposures to a new fund category intended to support the transition to a lower-carbon economy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Zepto Is Said to Face Sharply Lower Valuation for India IPO
top_signals.summary: Indian fast-delivery company Zepto Ltd. is seeking a valuation in an initial public offering sharply below its $7 billion peak as concerns over cash burn temper optimism around the industry and raise questions about the firm’s path to profitability.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Meet the billionaire heirs fighting to escape the family shadow
top_signals.summary: How 10 beneficiaries of the global ‘great wealth transfer’ are using their financial freedom
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
